news.paragraph: The Nasdaq 100 is currently trading near record highs, fueled by strong earnings reports and significant optimism surrounding artificial intelligence. Recent market trends show positive momentum in tech-heavy sectors, supported by substantial capital flows into semiconductor-related assets. Options traders should consider this backdrop of earnings-driven momentum and AI-related sentiment when evaluating volatility and direction.
